x-enumeration-literals.name: Regulatory Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that products, operations, and processes comply with applicable laws, regulations, and supervisory requirements in relevant jurisdictions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: AML Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Focuses on preventing and detecting money laundering and terrorist financing activities.
Includes transaction monitoring, suspicious activity reporting, and customer due diligence.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sanctions Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures that the institution does not engage with prohibited individuals, entities, or countries listed on sanctions lists.
Includes screening, filtering, and blocking transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Due Diligence Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Verifies customer identity and assesses risk before and during the relationship.
Includes onboarding checks, identity verification, and ongoing due diligence.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Monitoring Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors customer transactions to detect unusual or suspicious behavior that may indicate financial crime or regulatory breaches.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures adherence to tax reporting and withholding obligations.
Includes compliance with frameworks such as CRS (Common Reporting Standard) and FATCA (Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Protection & Privacy Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that customer and transaction data is collected, processed, stored, and shared in accordance with data protection laws (e.g., GDPR).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conduct & Consumer Protection Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures fair treatment of customers and transparency of products and services.
Includes disclosures, suitability checks, and complaint handling.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reporting & Regulatory Filing Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Manages the preparation and submission of required reports to regulators.
Includes financial, risk, and compliance reporting.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Policy & Governance Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensures adherence to internal policies, procedures, and corporate governance standards.
Includes internal audits and control frameworks.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Assessment & Compliance Review Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Evaluates compliance risks before and during product lifecycle.
Includes compliance assessments, reviews, and approvals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Licensing & Authorization Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that the institution and its activities are properly licensed and authorized by regulators.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fraud Prevention Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Detects and prevents fraudulent activities affecting customers or the institution.
Includes fraud monitoring and investigation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit & Assurance Compliance Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides independent verification that compliance controls and processes are effective and functioning as intended.
